---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

:::{.window-container}

:::{.window-header}
<span>Welcome!</span>
<div class="header-controls">
  <button class="header-btn" id="music-btn" onclick="toggleMusic()" title="Toggle ambient music">
    <i class="bi bi-music-note-beamed"></i>
  </button>
  <button class="header-btn" id="darkmode-btn" onclick="toggleDarkMode()" title="Toggle dark mode">
    <i class="bi bi-moon"></i>
  </button>
</div>
:::

:::{.window-body}

# Hi! [I'm Ariane]{.highlight}

### Scientist, Engineer, and Analyst

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.3/font/bootstrap-icons.min.css">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Amatic+SC:wght@400;700&display=swap">
<audio id="ambient-audio" src="audio/relaxing.mp3" loop></audio>
<audio id="sfx-open" src="audio/UI_open.mp3"></audio>
<audio id="sfx-close" src="audio/UI_close.mp3"></audio>
<div id="cursor"></div>
<div id="cursor-ring"></div>

<div class="main-nav-icons">
  <div class="icon-item" onclick="openPopup('about')">
    <i class="bi bi-info-circle"></i>
    <span>about</span>
  </div>
  <div class="icon-item" onclick="openPopup('links')">
    <i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i>
    <span>links</span>
  </div>
  <div class="icon-item" onclick="openPopup('work')">
    <i class="bi bi-folder"></i>
    <span>work</span>
  </div>
  <div class="icon-item" onclick="openPopup('contact')">
    <i class="bi bi-envelope-at"></i>
    <span>contact</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ABOUT popup -->
<div class="popup-window" id="popup-about">
  <div class="popup-header">
    <span>about</span>
    <button class="popup-close" onclick="closePopup('about')">✕</button>
  </div>
  <div class="popup-body">
    <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:20px; margin-bottom:20px;">
      <h3 style="margin:0; flex:1;">Hi, I'm Ariane!</h3>
      <img src="images/profile_pic.jpeg" alt="Ariane" style="width:110px; height:110px; border-radius:60%; object-fit:cover; flex-shrink:0; border:2px solid #828283;">
    </div>
    <p>A Chemical and Pharmaceutical Graduate with a passion for data and visualisation! Currently, I'm completeting my master's degree in Business Analytics in hopes of combining my scientific and engineering background with my interest in uncovering insights/patterns in data to make a positive impact.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- LINKS popup -->
<div class="popup-window" id="popup-links">
  <div class="popup-header">
    <span>links</span>
    <button class="popup-close" onclick="closePopup('links')">✕</button>
  </div>
  <div class="popup-body">
    <div class="links-grid">
      <a href="https://github.com/ariane-damian" target="_blank" class="link-item">
        <i class="bi bi-github"></i><span>GitHub</span>
      </a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/ariane-joie-damian-34027a1b8/" target="_blank" class="link-item">
        <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i><span>LinkedIn</span>
      </a>
      <a href="cv/Ariane Joie Damian_CV_2026.pdf" target="_blank" class="link-item">
        <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-person"></i><span>CV</span>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- WORK popup -->
<div class="popup-window" id="popup-work">
  <div class="popup-header">
    <span>work</span>
    <button class="popup-close" onclick="closePopup('work')">✕</button>
  </div>
  <div class="popup-body" style="padding:0; overflow:hidden; position:relative;">

    <!-- Work Carousel -->
    <div id="work-carousel" style="
      display: flex;
      transition: transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1);
      width: 400%;
      height: 100%;
    ">

      <!-- Page 1 -->
      <div class="work-page" style="width:25%; flex-shrink:0; padding:28px 32px; box-sizing:border-box; overflow-y:auto;">
        <div class="work-page-indicator">1 / 4</div>
        <h3 class="work-project-title" data-project="project1">Fraud Analysis</h3>
        <img src="images/Fraud_icon.jpg" alt="Fraud Analysis" style="width:100%; border-radius:8px; margin:0 0 16px; object-fit:contain; max-height:260px;">
        <p>Description. Click the title to learn more!</p>
      </div>

      <!-- Page 2 -->
      <div class="work-page" style="width:25%; flex-shrink:0; padding:28px 32px; box-sizing:border-box; overflow-y:auto;">
        <div class="work-page-indicator">2 / 4</div>
        <h3 class="work-project-title" data-project="project2">Yelp Star Ratings</h3>
        <img src="images/Yelp_icon.jpg" alt="Yelp Star Ratings" style="width:100%; border-radius:8px; margin:0 0 16px; object-fit:contain; max-height:260px;">
        <p>Description. Click the title to learn more!</p>
      </div>

      <!-- Page 3 -->
      <div class="work-page" style="width:25%; flex-shrink:0; padding:28px 32px; box-sizing:border-box; overflow-y:auto;">
        <div class="work-page-indicator">3 / 4</div>
        <h3 class="work-project-title" data-project="project3">E-commerce Sentiment Analysis</h3>
        <img src="images/Sentiment_icon.jpg" alt="E-commerce Sentiment Analysis" style="width:100%; border-radius:8px; margin:0 0 16px; object-fit:contain; max-height:260px;">
        <p> Description Click the title to learn more!</p>
      </div>

      <!-- Page 4 -->
      <div class="work-page" style="width:25%; flex-shrink:0; padding:28px 32px; box-sizing:border-box; overflow-y:auto;">
        <div class="work-page-indicator">4 / 4</div>
        <h3 style="margin: 5px 0 12px; color:#666; font-weight:300;">Personal Reflection</h3>
        <p>It's been an incredible journey creating this website. The entire process has really pushed me to experiment outside of my comfort zone and I owe it all to the wonderful support and guidance of my lecturer.<p>
          <p> Each element from start to finish, while incredibly challenging, was also simultaneously rewarding. My self-confidence regarding coding languages, particularly HTML/CSS has grown tremendously throughout this process, and I'm grateful for the opportunity to showcase my work.<p>
            <p> This is perhaps one of the rare occasions that I've used coding for fun and creativity, rather than just for academic and work purposes. I'm especially proud of the pop-up windows and quirky sounds, and I hope that whoever comes across this site gets the same level of enjoyment I did when interacting with all the elements :D.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Arrow buttons -->
    <button id="work-prev" onclick="workCarousel(-1)" style="
      position:absolute; left:10px; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%);
      background:rgba(127,164,252,0.15); border:1px solid rgba(127,164,252,0.4);
      border-radius:50%; width:32px; height:32px; font-size:1rem;
      cursor:pointer; color:#555; transition:background 0.2s;
      display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    ">‹</button>
    <button id="work-next" onclick="workCarousel(1)" style="
      position:absolute; right:10px; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%);
      background:rgba(127,164,252,0.15); border:1px solid rgba(127,164,252,0.4);
      border-radius:50%; width:32px; height:32px; font-size:1rem;
      cursor:pointer; color:#555; transition:background 0.2s;
      display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    ">›</button>

  </div>
</div>

<!-- CONTACT popup -->
<div class="popup-window" id="popup-contact">
  <div class="popup-header">
    <span>contact</span>
    <button class="popup-close" onclick="closePopup('contact')">✕</button>
  </div>
  <div class="popup-body">
    <h3>Get in touch!</h3>
    <p>The best way to reach me is by email:</p>
    <p><a href="mailto:ariane.damian2@gmail.com">ariane.damian2@gmail.com</a></p>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
// ── UI sound ─────────────────────────────────────
function playOpen() {
  const sfx = document.getElementById('sfx-open');
  sfx.currentTime = 0;
  sfx.play();
}
function playClose() {
  const sfx = document.getElementById('sfx-close');
  sfx.currentTime = 0;
  sfx.play();
}

// ── Z-index management ───────────────────────────────
let topZ = 200;
function bringToFront(el) {
  topZ++;
  el.style.zIndex = topZ;
}

// ── Popups ──────────────────────────────────────────
function openPopup(id) {
  const el = document.getElementById('popup-' + id);
  if (el.classList.contains('active')) {
    bringToFront(el);
    return;
  }
  playOpen();
  el.classList.remove('closing');
  el.classList.add('active');
  bringToFront(el);
}

function closePopup(id) {
  const el = document.getElementById('popup-' + id);
  if (!el.classList.contains('active')) return;
  playClose();
  el.classList.remove('active');
  el.classList.add('closing');
  el.addEventListener('animationend', function handler() {
    el.classList.remove('closing');
    el.removeEventListener('animationend', handler);
  });
}

document.querySelectorAll('.popup-window').forEach(function(win) {
  win.addEventListener('mousedown', function() {
    bringToFront(win);
  });
});

document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
  if (e.key === 'Escape') {
    const active = [...document.querySelectorAll('.popup-window.active')]
      .sort((a, b) => parseInt(b.style.zIndex || 200) - parseInt(a.style.zIndex || 200));
    if (active.length) {
      const id = active[0].id.replace('popup-', '');
      closePopup(id);
    }
  }
});

// ── Move popups ──────────────────────────────
document.querySelectorAll('.popup-window').forEach(function(win) {
  const header = win.querySelector('.popup-header');

  let isDragging = false;
  let startX, startY, startLeft, startTop;

  header.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) {
    if (e.target.closest('.popup-close')) return;

    isDragging = true;
    bringToFront(win);

    startX = e.clientX;
    startY = e.clientY;

    startLeft = win.offsetLeft;
    startTop = win.offsetTop;

    win.style.position = 'fixed';
    win.style.left = startLeft + 'px';
    win.style.top = startTop + 'px';
    win.style.transform = 'none';
    win.style.margin = '0';

    e.preventDefault();
  });

  document.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) {
    if (!isDragging) return;
    win.style.left = (startLeft + e.clientX - startX) + 'px';
    win.style.top  = (startTop  + e.clientY - startY) + 'px';
  });

  document.addEventListener('mouseup', function() {
    isDragging = false;
  });
});

// ── Ambient music ────────────────────────────────────
let musicPlaying = false;
function toggleMusic() {
  const audio = document.getElementById('ambient-audio');
  const btn = document.getElementById('music-btn');
  if (musicPlaying) {
    audio.pause();
    btn.innerHTML = '<i class="bi bi-music-note-beamed"></i>';
    btn.classList.remove('active-btn');
  } else {
    audio.play();
    btn.innerHTML = '<i class="bi bi-music-note-list"></i>';
    btn.classList.add('active-btn');
  }
  musicPlaying = !musicPlaying;
}

// ── Dark mode ────────────────────────────────────────
let darkMode = false;
function toggleDarkMode() {
  const btn = document.getElementById('darkmode-btn');
  darkMode = !darkMode;
  darkMode ? playOpen() : playClose();
  document.body.classList.toggle('dark-mode', darkMode);
  btn.innerHTML = darkMode
    ? '<i class="bi bi-sun"></i>'
    : '<i class="bi bi-moon"></i>';
}

// ── Custom cursor ────────────────────────────────────
(function() {
  const cursor = document.getElementById('cursor');
  const ring = document.getElementById('cursor-ring');

  document.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) {
    cursor.style.left = e.clientX + 'px';
    cursor.style.top  = e.clientY + 'px';
    ring.style.left   = e.clientX + 'px';
    ring.style.top    = e.clientY + 'px';
  });

  document.addEventListener('mousedown', function() {
    document.body.classList.add('cursor-click');
  });
  document.addEventListener('mouseup', function() {
    document.body.classList.remove('cursor-click');
  });

  const hoverTargets = 'a, button, .icon-item, .popup-close, .header-btn, .link-item, .work-project-title';
  document.addEventListener('mouseover', function(e) {
    if (e.target.closest(hoverTargets)) {
      document.body.classList.add('cursor-hover');
    }
  });
  document.addEventListener('mouseout', function(e) {
    if (e.target.closest(hoverTargets)) {
      document.body.classList.remove('cursor-hover');
    }
  });

  document.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() {
    cursor.style.opacity = '0';
    ring.style.opacity = '0';
  });
  document.addEventListener('mouseenter', function() {
    cursor.style.opacity = '1';
    ring.style.opacity = '1';
  });
})();

// ── Work carousel ─────────────────────────────────
let workPage = 0;
const workTotal = 4;

function workCarousel(dir) {
  workPage = (workPage + dir + workTotal) % workTotal;
  const carousel = document.getElementById('work-carousel');
  carousel.style.transform = `translateX(-${workPage * 25}%)`;
}

(function() {
  const body = document.querySelector('#popup-work .popup-body');
  let touchStartX = 0;
  body.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e) {
    touchStartX = e.touches[0].clientX;
  }, { passive: true });
  body.addEventListener('touchend', function(e) {
    const diff = touchStartX - e.changedTouches[0].clientX;
    if (Math.abs(diff) > 40) workCarousel(diff > 0 ? 1 : -1);
  }, { passive: true });
})();
</script>
```

:::

:::{style="background:#7fa4fc; color:#eeeeee; padding:10px 20px; font-family:'Courier New', Courier, monospace; font-size:0.9rem; display:flex; justify-content:center; align-items:center; gap:20px;"}
<span>© 2025 Ariane Damian</span>
<span>·</span>
<span>Built with <a href="https://quarto.org" target="_blank" style="color:#eeeeee;">Quarto</a></span>
:::

:::

```{=html}
<div class="bubbles-container" id="bubbles-container"></div>
<script>
(function() {
  const container = document.getElementById('bubbles-container');
  const count = 40;
  for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    const b = document.createElement('div');
    b.className = 'bubble';
    const size = Math.random() * 60 + 20;
    b.style.cssText = `
      width: ${size}px;
      height: ${size}px;
      left: ${Math.random() * 100}vw;
      animation-duration: ${Math.random() * 14 + 10}s;
      animation-delay: ${Math.random() * 12}s;
      --drift: ${(Math.random() - 0.5) * 120}px;
      --end-scale: ${0.7 + Math.random() * 0.6};
    `;
    container.appendChild(b);
  }
})();
</script>
```
